mapper.insert: INSERT INTO generated_asset (owner_id, type, prompt, storage_key, task_id, status, error) VALUES (#{ownerId}, #{type}, #{prompt}, #{storageKey}, #{taskId}, #{status}, #{error})
mapper.select: SELECT id, owner_id, type, prompt, storage_key, task_id, status, error FROM generated_asset WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT id, owner_id, type, prompt, storage_key, task_id, status, error FROM generated_asset WHERE owner_id = #{ownerId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY id DESC
